name: Swiggy HDFC Bank BLCK Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Swiggy App transactions (Food delivery, Instamart, Dineout, Genie)
Select online categories and merchants (Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Nykaa, Ola, Uber, etc.)

exclusions: Prepaid card, gift card, and wallet loads
Purchase of foreign currency and related fees
joiningBenefits: Complimentary 3-month Swiggy BLCK membership on card activation by completing at least 1 transaction of any amount within 30 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: 4 complimentary rounds of green fees and 12 complimentary golf lessons per calendar year (Mastercard World benefit)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Cashback is automatically adjusted against your credit card's outstanding statement balance in the subsequent billing cycle.
Minimum transaction of Rs 100 required to earn cashback on eligible transactions.
Cashback is calculated and posted to your card account based on your billing cycle.

salaried: Net monthly income Rs 25,000 or above
selfEmployed: Annual ITR Rs 6 lakh or above

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Audited against official HDFC Bank Swiggy BLCK Credit Card product page and terms on 2026-06-07.
The Swiggy BLCK variant has a higher annual fee of Rs 1,000 with no renewal fee waiver option.
Cashback is credited directly to the credit card statement.
Mastercard World golf benefits include 4 complimentary green fee rounds and 12 golf lessons annually.
1.75% DCC markup fee applies on transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
